{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|seo}}
{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|infobox}}
<% if (it.hasDescription) { %>
{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|description}}
<% } else { -%>
''To be written.''
<% } -%>
<% if (it.hasBriefing) { %>
== Briefing ==
{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|briefing}}
<% } -%>
<% if (it.hasVoicelines) { %>
== Voicelines ==
{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|voicelines}}
<% } -%>
<% if (it.hasStages) { %>
== Stages ==
{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|stages}}
<% } -%>
<% if (it.hasRewards) { %>
== Rewards ==
{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|rewards}}
<% } -%>
<% if (it.hasRelated) { %>
== Related ==
{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|related}}
<% } -%>

{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|categories}}
